things.name: Cristo Rei of Dili
things.description: 27m statue of Christ on a hilltop - a gift from Portugal, similar to Rio's but 3m taller

things.name: Atauro Island
things.description: 40km offshore island with the world's highest marine biodiversity above a coral reef

things.name: Chega! Exhibition (Resistance Archive)
things.description: Powerful exhibition documenting the Indonesian occupation and Timorese resistance

things.name: Patimar Beach
things.description: Clean beach walk west of Dili with excellent snorkelling

things.name: Tais Market
things.description: Dili's main crafts market for traditional Timorese tais woven cloth - a UNESCO heritage art

things.name: Santa Cruz Cemetery Memorial
things.description: Site of the 1991 Santa Cruz massacre that shocked the world and led to independence

things.name: Xanana Gusmao Reading Room
things.description: Library and cultural centre named after Timor-Leste's first president

things.name: Dare Memorial (Dare Ridge)
things.description: WWII memorial site and panoramic views over Dili from the hills

things.name: Maubisse & Same Mountain Drive
things.description: Portuguese colonial hill stations with cool air, coffee plantations and dramatic scenery

things.name: Batar Toor (Corn Soup)
things.description: Timor-Leste's signature dish - corn and sweet potato soup with coconut milk and pork
